name: Enterprise Products Partners
confidenceReason: Best-in-class midstream MLP. Conservative management, 25 consecutive years of distribution growth. Lower volatility but also lower upside.
bullCase: Most conservative and best-managed midstream MLP. 25 consecutive years of distribution increases. Investment-grade balance sheet. NGL and petrochemical infrastructure benefits from US shale production growth. 5.8% yield with 3-5% distribution growth.
bearCase: Slower growth profile than ET or LNG. MLP tax complexity. Lower upside at current valuation. Energy transition could reduce long-term hydrocarbon volumes.

cagrModel.basis: GAAP EPS; utility-like stability warrants narrow PE range
